name: TestWaitForLinLongDominantSignal
title: TestWaitForLinLongDominantSignal
description: Waits for the occurrence of a LIN long dominant signal. Should the frame not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]. (Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
